meta.collection_method: Primary plan is Tavily-first. In this run Tavily MCP was not available in-session, so candidates were collected with web search fallback and source-date screening.
meta.notes: This file stores daily research candidates for the next weekly leaderboard refresh. Items here do not change the official ranking until reviewed, deduplicated, and merged into the main dataset.

items.title: EY 发布 enterprise-scale agentic AI operating system 案例
items.summary: EY 发布案例文章，披露其将既有 GenAI 进展整合为全球 agentic AI operating system，用统一平台支撑内部工作方式变革，并帮助客户加速 AI at scale。
items.why_it_matters: 这是强平台化和生产化信号，表明 EY 在内部 operating model 与外部 client enablement 上都在推进 agentic AI。
items.merge_rationale: This event is already present in the official leaderboard dataset dated 2026-06-27, so it should not be re-merged.

items.title: Deloitte 在 Omnia 中推出统一 agentic intelligence network
items.summary: 媒体报道 Deloitte 将统一 agentic intelligence network 纳入全球审计与鉴证平台 Omnia，让不同 AI agents 在同一框架下协同执行风险识别、证据分析和文档起草等工作流。
items.why_it_matters: 体现 Deloitte 正把 agentic AI 嵌入高频专业工作流，是典型的平台资产与交付工业化信号。
items.merge_rationale: This event is already present in the official leaderboard dataset dated 2026-06-27 and should stay there without duplication.

items.title: PwC AI Jobs Barometer 获新一轮媒体引用，强调 AI 岗位与薪资继续走强
items.summary: 媒体基于 PwC 的 AI Jobs Barometer 报道英国 AI 相关招聘与薪资继续跑赢整体就业市场，反映 PwC 在 AI 与劳动力议题上的公开研究影响力。
items.why_it_matters: 属于典型的 thought leadership 信号，但本质上仍是对既有 PwC 研究的媒体扩散。
items.merge_rationale: This event was already merged in the 2026-06-27 snapshot, so it should remain in the intake history only as a duplicate guardrail.

items.title: KPMG 与 Microsoft 扩展 Agent 365 与 Copilot 的全球部署
items.summary: Microsoft 披露 KPMG 将 Agent 365 用于 AI agents 的部署、监控和更新，并扩大 Microsoft 365 Copilot 的使用范围，重点强调 governance 与 lifecycle management。
items.why_it_matters: 这是 KPMG 在治理、生命周期管理和大规模内部部署上的强信号，但发布日期早于当前正式榜单快照。
items.merge_rationale: High-quality signal, but older than the current official snapshot date 2026-06-27. Keep only as a watch item or backfill note, not as next week's net-new addition.

items.title: OpenAI Partner Network 首发名单覆盖多家头部咨询公司
items.summary: OpenAI 官方在 2026-06-14 公布首发 Partner Network 名单，包含多家全球咨询公司，并强调 transformation expertise、forward deployed engineering 与 enterprise deployment 能力。
items.why_it_matters: 这是横向可比的高价值生态证据，适合持续作为行业比较锚点，但已早于当前快照且已并入正式榜单。
items.merge_rationale: Already reflected in the current official leaderboard and useful here only as a sector-level reference point for daily tracking.
